input.prompt:
I have a solution with 3 MSTest 3.8.0 test projects that currently run on VSTest.
I want to switch all of them to Microsoft.Testing.Platform. We're on .NET 8 SDK
and use `dotnet test --logger trx` in CI. What changes do I need to make to each
project and to the CI command? I want properties set consistently across all projects.

input.initialPrompt:
I have a solution with 3 MSTest 3.8.0 test projects that currently run on VSTest.
I want to switch all of them to Microsoft.Testing.Platform. We're on .NET 8 SDK
and use `dotnet test --logger trx` in CI. What changes do I need to make to each
project and to the CI command? I want properties set consistently across all projects.

data.content:
Here's what you need:

## 1. Add a `Directory.Build.props` (at solution root)

This sets properties consistently across all test projects:

```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <UseTestingPlatform>true</UseTestingPlatform>
    <TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>true</TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

- **`UseTestingPlatform`** – switches MSTest 3.8+ to the new platform (replaces VSTest host).
- **`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`** – enables `dotnet test` compatibility with the new platform.

## 2. Each test project `.csproj` – no structural changes needed

MSTest 3.8.0 already bundles the testing platform. Just ensure each project references:

```xml
<PackageReference Include="MSTest" Version="3.8.0" />
```

If you still have the older split packages (`MSTest.TestAdapter` + `MSTest.TestFramework`), replace them with the unified `MSTest` 3.8.0 package.

## 3. CI command change

```bash
# Before (VSTest)
dotnet test --logger trx

# After (Microsoft.Testing.Platform)
dotnet test --logger trx --results-directory ./TestResults
```

The command stays essentially the same — `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` makes `dotnet test` act as a compatibility layer. The `--logger trx` flag continues to work. Specifying `--results-directory` is recommended since output paths differ slightly on the new platform.

## Summary of changes

| Scope | Change |
|-------|--------|
| `Directory.Build.props` | Add `UseTestingPlatform` + `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` |
| Each `.csproj` | Use unified `MSTest` 3.8.0 package (remove old adapter/framework split if present) |
| CI command | No change required (`--logger trx` still works) |

No test code changes are needed — MSTest attributes and assertions remain the same.
data.reasoningText: The user wants to migrate 3 MSTest 3.8.0 test projects from VSTest to Microsoft.Testing.Platform on .NET 8 SDK. Let me provide a concise answer covering the necessary changes.
